name: Verve Group
description: Mobile ad platform with HyBid SDK for publishers, offering in-app programmatic monetization and DSP services.

seo.title: Verve Group — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Verve Group: Mobile ad platform with HyBid SDK for publishers, offering in-app programmatic monetization and DSP services.

when_to_use: In-app programmatic monetization via HyBid SDK for publishers
DSP campaigns using Verve first-party audience data
Mobile ad monetization via Performance+ Marketplace access

pros: Owns HyBid SDK plus Performance+ marketplace
Unified parent for PubNative and others
cons: Brand consolidation still confusing to buyers
review.verdict: Growing European full-stack mobile ad platform, promising but still consolidating its product story.
review.best_for: European mobile publishers wanting an independent alternative to US giants.
review.not_for: Publishers needing the largest demand density or a single simple SDK story.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
